text.title: language-framework-guide Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the recommendation report and ADR-stub fields.

example.note: Stack-name-only output (r5 violated); no alternatives, no ADR.

list.item: Exactly 2 alternatives, each with its own tradeoff statement.
ADR stub has all 5 sections filled.
For >6mo projects, ADR status is at least "proposed" and routed for sign-off.
